"/usr/sbin/gcc-ar" qc libncnn.a CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/blob.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/c_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/mat_pixel_affine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/mat_pixel_drawing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/mat_pixel_resize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/mat_pixel_rotate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/modelbin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/net.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/option.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/paramdict.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/pipelinecache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/simpleocv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/simpleomp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/simplestl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/layer/concat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/layer/x86/concat_x86.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/layer/vulkan/concat_vulkan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ncnn.dir/layer/x86/concat_x86_avx512.cpp.o
